chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1723 of 2012 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.5781/2012 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 24.10.2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Javed Ahmed Channa, Assistant Education Officer (Primary), Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present on behalf of the petitioners. No intimation is received. Even otherwise, we have seen contents of the petition. Petitioners have approached this Court for appointment as Primary School Teacher in terms of Teachers’ Recruitment Policy-2012. Learned AAG has informed that although the petitioners had qualified the test, but on merit list, they were at the bottom; hence, were not appointed. Accordingly, in view of above, this petition is disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
